home.heroTitle: Learn from tutors who fit your schedule
home.heroSubtitle: Browse expert tutors across maths, languages, music and more. See real-time availability in your timezone and book a lesson in seconds.
home.feature1Body: Timezone- and DST-aware slots, so the time you see is the time you get.
home.feature2Body: Pick a slot, confirm, done — no back-and-forth messaging.
home.feature3Body: From calculus to conversational Arabic, find a tutor for it.

discover.title: Find a tutor
